query_sql:
SELECT
    CAST(s."BWART" AS VARCHAR) AS code,
    d.description_en                   AS description,
    'movement_type_mapping'            AS description_source,
    COUNT(*)                           AS cnt
  FROM raw_sap.mseg s
  LEFT JOIN main_seeds.movement_type_mapping d
    ON d.movement_type = CAST(s."BWART" AS INTEGER)
 GROUP BY s."BWART", d.description_en
 ORDER BY cnt DESC

query_sql:
SELECT
    CAST(s."BWART" AS VARCHAR) AS code,
    d.description_en                   AS description,
    'movement_type_mapping'            AS description_source,
    COUNT(*)                           AS cnt
  FROM raw_sap.mseg s
  LEFT JOIN main_seeds.movement_type_mapping d
    ON d.movement_type = CAST(s."BWART" AS INTEGER)
 GROUP BY s."BWART", d.description_en
 ORDER BY cnt DESC

query_sql:
SELECT
    CAST(s."MJAHR" AS VARCHAR) AS code,
    NULL                               AS description,
    'none'                             AS description_source,
    COUNT(*)                           AS cnt
  FROM raw_sap.mkpf s
 GROUP BY s."MJAHR"
 ORDER BY cnt DESC

query_sql:
SELECT
    CAST(s."BWART" AS VARCHAR) AS code,
    d.description_en                   AS description,
    'movement_type_mapping'            AS description_source,
    COUNT(*)                           AS cnt
  FROM raw_sap.mseg s
  LEFT JOIN main_seeds.movement_type_mapping d
    ON d.movement_type = CAST(s."BWART" AS INTEGER)
 GROUP BY s."BWART", d.description_en
 ORDER BY cnt DESC

       SUM("RMWWR") AS measure_total,

    NULL                               AS description,
    'none'                             AS description_source,
    COUNT(*)                           AS cnt
  FROM raw_sap.rbkp s
 GROUP BY s."GJAHR"
 ORDER BY cnt DESC

query_sql:
SELECT CAST("GJAHR" AS VARCHAR) AS dim_value,
       SUM("WRBTR") AS measure_total,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count
  FROM raw_sap.rseg
 GROUP BY "GJAHR"
 ORDER BY measure_total DESC
 LIMIT 10

query_sql:
SELECT
    CAST(s."GJAHR" AS VARCHAR) AS code,
    NULL                               AS description,
    'none'                             AS description_source,
    COUNT(*)                           AS cnt
  FROM raw_sap.rseg s
 GROUP BY s."GJAHR"
 ORDER BY cnt DESC

query_sql:
SELECT CAST("MATKL" AS VARCHAR) AS dim_value,
       SUM("NETWR") AS measure_total,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count
  FROM raw_sap.vbap
 GROUP BY "MATKL"
 ORDER BY measure_total DESC
 LIMIT 10

SELECT
    CAST(s."MATKL" AS VARCHAR) AS code,
    NULL                               AS description,
    'none'                             AS description_source,
    COUNT(*)                           AS cnt
  FROM raw_sap.vbap s
 GROUP BY s."MATKL"
 ORDER BY cnt DESC

       SUM("product_weight_g") AS measure_total,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count
  FROM raw_olist.products
 GROUP BY "product_category_name"
 ORDER BY measure_total DESC
 LIMIT 10
